expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus in both Scope and assessment. result.md: "Case focus (blocking): skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow." It also discusses inability to validate it due to missing artifacts, but the focus itself is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md explicitly aligns to holdout: "Phase alignment (primary phase: holdout)" and "limited to a holdout regression gate determination using only provided evidence." result.md likewise frames the work as "Holdout Regression Gate" and "Evidence evaluated (holdout_regression mode) Only the provided fixture evidence was used."
